homepage.spotlightSubtitle: An all-in-one portable workspace organizer designed for modern professionals.
homepage.aboutText: At AvelixLink, we combine thoughtful design, practical functionality, and global manufacturing resources to create products that improve workspaces, productivity, and everyday life.
aboutPoints: Quality materials with a premium finish

products.name: Foldable Workspace Dock
products.description: An all-in-one portable workspace organizer designed for modern professionals.
functions: Foldable structure that keeps your desk essentials organized
Modular compartments for daily tools, cables and devices
Compact footprint for home offices, studios and shared desks
Portable design for productive setups anywhere you work
products.detailDescription: Compact, modular and built for productivity wherever you work.

products.name: Wireless Charging Phone Stand
products.description: Desktop wireless charging stand with stable viewing angle, non-slip surface, and convenient fast-charge support.
functions: Supports wireless charging while the phone stays visible
Angled stand design for vertical viewing on desks
Non-slip charging surface for improved device stability
Suitable for office, retail gift, and tech accessory lines
products.detailDescription: This wireless charging phone stand combines practical charging with a display-friendly viewing angle, making it ideal for office and bedside use. It is a strong choice for modern workspaces that want technology accessories to feel clean, premium, and easy to integrate into everyday setups.

detailImages.title: Product View
detailImages.text: Desktop-facing image for product page and listings.

detailImages.title: Usage Scene
detailImages.text: Shows how the stand fits on a work or bedside surface.

detailImages.title: Detail View
detailImages.text: Highlights charging angle and material finish.

products.name: Hiking Backpack
products.description: 40L hiking backpack with multi-point straps, side mesh storage, and outdoor-ready carrying capacity.
functions: Large-capacity main compartment for overnight and hiking gear
Compression straps for better weight balance
Side mesh pockets for bottle or pole storage
Padded support areas for improved comfort during long use
products.detailDescription: This hiking backpack combines strong carrying performance with a clean silhouette, making it useful for commuting, travel, and everyday gear organization. The 40L format supports flexible daily use while keeping essentials easy to access and carry.

detailImages.title: Product View
detailImages.text: Front product image suitable for product grids and quotations.

detailImages.title: Usage Scene
detailImages.text: Helps customers visualize outdoor and travel positioning.

detailImages.title: Detail View
detailImages.text: Focuses on straps, shape, and storage structure.

products.name: Travel Water Bottle
products.description: Insulated travel bottle with carry handle, secure locking lid, and all-day temperature retention.
functions: Vacuum insulation for hot or cold beverage retention
Portable carry handle for travel and outdoor convenience
Leak-resistant locking lid for commuting and movement
Clean matte finish suitable for gift and lifestyle retail
products.detailDescription: This insulated travel water bottle is a practical SKU for lifestyle, commuting, and travel categories. The secure handle-top lid and streamlined matte body give it a premium look, while the durable insulated construction makes it suitable for everyday carry, road trips, and light outdoor use.

detailImages.title: Product View
detailImages.text: Commercial hero image used in the main catalog.

detailImages.title: Usage Scene
detailImages.text: Suitable for gift, commuting, and travel positioning.

detailImages.title: Detail View
detailImages.text: Highlights carry handle and insulated construction.

products.name: Car Seat Organizer Bag
products.description: Backseat organizer with multiple pockets for tablets, bottles, tissues, cables, and daily car essentials.
functions: Multi-pocket storage for daily travel accessories
Keeps tablets, phones, and tissues within reach
Hanging seat-back installation for quick setup
Helps reduce backseat clutter for family and ride-share use
products.detailDescription: This car seat organizer bag is built for practical everyday vehicle storage. Its layered pocket layout supports tablets, tissue packs, drink bottles, charging cables, and personal accessories, making it a good fit for family travel, ride-share use, and organized commuting.

specs.Features: Tissue Slot + Bottle Holder + Tablet Pocket

detailImages.title: Product View
detailImages.text: Flat-lay product image for product page and sales deck use.

detailImages.text: Shows the product in family and travel use cases.

detailImages.text: Focuses on pocket layout and hanging design.

products.name: Trekking Poles
products.description: Adjustable trekking poles with ergonomic grips, quick-lock sections, and trail-ready stability support.
functions: Adjustable height for different users and terrains
Ergonomic grip with wrist strap for hiking comfort
Section locks for stable setup during mountain use
Improves balance and joint support on uneven trails
products.detailDescription: These trekking poles combine lightweight portability with dependable support for active outdoor use. The adjustable structure and ergonomic grip make them easy to carry, simple to use, and well suited to travel, walking, and weekend adventure routines.

detailImages.title: Product View
detailImages.text: Hero image for outdoor catalog and quotation sheets.

detailImages.title: Usage Scene
detailImages.text: Supports trekking and mountain retail storytelling.

detailImages.title: Detail View
detailImages.text: Highlights grip, sections, and locking structure.
